name: Poor Man's Caviar [Baklazhannaya Ikra]
recipeIngredient: Pumpernickel bread or sesame seed crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Bake the eggplant in the center of the oven for about 1 hour.
2. Meanwhile, cook the onions in 4 tablespoons olive oil over moderate heat for 6 to 8 minutes until they are soft but not brown. Stir in the pepper and garlic and cook, stirring, for 5 more minutes.
3. Scrape the entire contents into a food processor bowl.
4. Remove the skin from the eggplant and add it to the food processor. Pulse until the desired texture is reached – you can achieve a coarse, smooth, or any consistency in between.
5. Add the tomatoes, salt, pepper, and sugar.
6. Heat the remaining oil in a skillet and pour in the eggplant mixture. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, then turn off the heat, cover, and simmer for about 1 hour. Remove the cover and cook an additional half-hour, stirring frequently until all moisture has evaporated and the mixture is thick enough to hold its shape when spooned.
7. Stir in 2 tablespoons lemon juice and taste for seasoning. Transfer to a bowl and chill, covered with plastic wrap, until ready to serve.
8. Spread on squares of pumpernickel bread or sesame crackers.
